seoTitle: Macquarie Links vs Macquarie Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Macquarie Links and Macquarie Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Macquarie Links vs Macquarie Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macquarie Links and Macquarie Park.
heading: Macquarie Links vs Macquarie Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macquarie Links, New South Wales and Macquarie Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macquarie Links and Macquarie Park have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Macquarie Links or Macquarie Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macquarie Links has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Macquarie Park scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macquarie Links scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Macquarie Park scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macquarie Links or Macquarie Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macquarie Links has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
